response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with ~13-14 years of professional experience and broad polyglot skills, but the role demands a Director-level IC with 15+ years and recognized AI expertise. There is no demonstrated track record of building AI products/platforms, no ML/AI research background, and no evidence of cloud/AI platform strategy work or advising strategic customers at the level required for a Principal/Director-level position.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, public talks/workshops
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or AI products/platforms shipped at scale
Falls short of the 15-year requirement and lacks Director/Principal-level IC track record
No demonstrated cloud platform strategy work or experience advising strategic customers/partners

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Insufficient seniority for Director-level IC scope (strategy, advising customers)
Strong engineering breadth and craftsmanship foundation
